title: Multimodal fitness bar
abstract: A multimodal fitness bar with a bar assembly and resistance assembly is disclosed. Exemplary implementations may further include a hanging member, a weighting assembly, a toggle assembly, a furling member, and/or other components. The resistance assembly may include a flexible fabric sheet with an opening configured to receive a user's foot and the bar assembly may include handles configured to be gripped by a user.
claims: 1. A multimodal fitness bar, comprising: a sheet and a handle comprising at least one battery and a charging port; a resistance assembly coupled with the handle; the resistance assembly comprising a heating element; and wherein the heating element is connected to the at least one battery.
